evidence: "I grew up with these kind of movies as a kid in the 50's, so they are very nostalgic to me."
"James Wan is a good director and producer and I hope he continues in this genre."
"The plot is weak, acting weak... Overall, not all that great, except for a look into 1950's life somewhat, which makes it worthwhile to watch."
"The story itself is quite entertaining. A undercover cop who strongly resembles a notorious criminal... More talk than violence..."
"The pace of the movie kept your interest."
"It was nicely done for a TV movie and enjoyable."
"You can tell this wasn't a Hollywood movie. It was enjoyable to watch, plenty of action scenes, humor, even a touch of religion."
"The quality of the video is comparable to Alpha Video but the story itself is quite entertaining."
"James Wan is a good director and producer and I hope he continues in this genre."
"I'm a fan of William Powell and Myrna Loy in their Thin Man movies."
"The history this movie shows from the iron lung, Boulder dam, and the Streak itself makes this movie great."
"Imagine a movie without sex, profanity, or gore."
"It evoked a lot of memory, some still as fresh as the day it happened."
"Yes, we lost quite the person with his untimely death which makes this movie very special to many of us."

summary: The user has a strong preference for nostalgic and historical films, particularly those from the 1950s. They appreciate simple narratives and emotional resonance, often valuing entertainment over high production quality.
